title: M3 Tasks Document - Granular Task Breakdown with LLM Prompts
description: Comprehensive tasks document for M3 milestone with 35 granular tasks in flat list format, including detailed LLM prompts for each task, file paths, leverage points, and requirements mapping.
keyPoints: 35 granular tasks in flat list format (no phase/day hierarchy)
Each task follows template format: checkbox, file, description, purpose, leverage, requirements, prompt
Detailed LLM prompts with Role | Task | Restrictions | Success format
Absolute file paths using C:\GitHub\AGENTS\ prefix
Requirements mapping to requirements.md acceptance criteria
Tasks 10-12: agents-library Prerequisites (AgentRole extension, KADI event naming, agent-producer event migration)
Task 25: DaemonAgent Generic Command System (reference to existing spec at C:\GitHub\DaemonAgent\.spec-workflow\specs\generic-command-system\)
reviewNotes:
Please review the revised tasks document and verify that:
1. Format matches tasks-template.md (flat list with checkboxes)
2. All 35 tasks are granular and actionable
3. LLM prompts follow the format (Role | Task | Restrictions | Success)
4. File paths are correct (absolute paths with C:\GitHub\AGENTS\)
5. Leverage points reference correct design.md sections
6. Requirements mapping is accurate (all use X.Y format)
7. agents-library prerequisite tasks (10-12) properly precede agent-worker/shadow-worker tasks
8. KADI event naming migration (task 11) addresses generic events with agent metadata
9. DaemonAgent task (25) correctly references existing generic-command-system spec
10. Each task has all required fields (file, description, purpose, leverage, requirements, prompt)
revisionNotes:
Revision 2 - Major restructuring based on 3 feedback comments:

**Comment 1: agents-library involvement**
Investigated C:\GitHub\agents-library and found it already contains AgentRole type, createWorkerAgent/createShadowAgent factories, and kadi-event-publisher.ts. Added 3 new prerequisite tasks (10-12):
- Task 10: Extend AgentRole type and add RoleConfigLoader in agents-library
- Task 11: Migrate KADI event naming to generic pattern in agents-library
- Task 12: Update agent-producer event subscribers for generic events

**Comment 2: KADI event naming**
Investigated kadi-core and kadi-broker. Confirmed the system supports generic event names with agent metadata in payload via RabbitMQ topic exchange with wildcard subscriptions. Implemented migration from role-specific events (artist.task.completed) to generic events (task.completed with {agentId, agentRole} in payload). Tasks 11-12 handle this migration.

**Comment 3: DaemonAgent complexity**
Investigated C:\GitHub\DaemonAgent and found existing generic-command-system spec with 933-line requirements.md (8 requirement categories, 60+ acceptance criteria) and design.md. Replaced 8 DaemonAgent tasks (old 22-29) with single reference task (new 25) pointing to the existing spec.

**Structural changes:**
- Reduced from 40 to 35 tasks
- Added tasks 10-12 (agents-library prerequisites)
- Renumbered worker agent tasks to 13-20 (was 10-17)
- Renumbered shadow agent tasks to 21-24 (was 18-21)
- Replaced 8 DaemonAgent tasks with 1 reference task (25)
- Renumbered workflow tasks to 26-29 (was 30-33)
- Renumbered KADI verification tasks to 30-32 (was 34-36)
- Renumbered buffer/documentation tasks to 33-35 (was 37-40)
- All requirements use specific X.Y format
- All acceptance criteria covered (1.1-1.7, 2.1-2.7, 3.1-3.7, 4.1-4.7, 5.1-5.7, 6.1-6.7)
